title: KARMA Domain Definition
description: Single Source of Truth for Domain Definitions. No skill mapping, no hardcoded routing. Capabilities + Evidence Rules only.

id.description: Unique domain identifier. Lowercase, kebab-case. Used as primary key across all layers.

layer.description: Architectural layer. Determines load order and isolation rules.

scope.description: Scope of validity. global = available to all projects. project = isolated to owning project.

version.description: Semantic version. Breaking changes to evidence_rules or capabilities require major bump.

items.description: Capability name. Abstract ability this domain provides. NOT a skill name. Examples: secret_detection, vulnerability_scan, dependency_analysis, config_drift_detection

capabilities.description: Capabilities this domain offers. Resolved to skills at runtime by CapabilityResolver, not hardcoded here.

depends_on.description: Domain IDs this domain depends on. Load order respects dependencies. Cross-layer deps allowed: project → infrastructure → technology → core.

evidence_rules.description: Declarative rules for generating Claims and collecting Evidence. Each key is a claim statement pattern.

type.description: EvidenceType this rule produces. Maps to EvidenceType enum.

glob.description: Glob pattern for file_glob kind. Relative to project root.

command.description: Shell command for command_output kind. Run in project root.

confidence.description: Base confidence for evidence produced by this pattern.

claims.description: Explicit claims this domain asserts when activated. Each claim becomes a Claim object if evidence supports it.

statement.description: Human-readable claim statement. E.g., 'Repository uses Docker Compose for service orchestration'

evidence_types.description: Required evidence types to support this claim. All must be present for CONFIRMED status.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum aggregate confidence for this claim to be SUPPORTED.

ownership.description: Who can modify this domain definition. Enforced by Loader at write time.

mutable_by.description: Roles allowed to modify this domain. 'any' = no restriction (only for project scope).

default_owner.description: Default owner for new instances of this domain (for project scope).

metadata.description: Free-form metadata. Not used by runtime. For documentation/tooling.
